final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-fantasy
Asset type: children's book illustration, digital painting
Primary request: dreamy underwater fairy-tale world with mermaids swimming among coral reefs, glowing jellyfish, and sunken treasure
Scene/backdrop: enchanted ocean depths with coral reef formations, ancient shipwreck with scattered gold coins and chests, sunbeams piercing from surface
Subject: graceful mermaids with flowing hair and shimmering tails, translucent bioluminescent jellyfish, colorful tropical fish
Style/medium: fantasy digital illustration, whimsical storybook aesthetic, soft painterly style
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, diagonal sunbeams creating depth layers
Lighting/mood: ethereal god rays filtering through water, magical bioluminescence, dreamy and wonder-filled atmosphere
Color palette: iridescent blues and teals, coral pinks and oranges, gold treasure accents, soft violet and cyan glows
Materials/textures: silky mermaid tails with scale shimmer, soft jellyfish translucency, weathered wood of shipwreck, smooth pearls and gold
Constraints: maintain dreamlike quality with all elements harmoniously blended
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, harsh shadows, cluttered composition, scary or dark tones
